title: ilex montana var. mollis
intro: Ilex montana var. mollis, also known as Mountain Holly or Mop Top, is a variety of the Ilex montana plant, a shrub native to the mountainous regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Ilex montana var. mollis are said to include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
